-   More
    
    [Documentation](https://docs.gitlab.com/user/gitlab_duo/model_context_protocol/mcp_server/)[Privacy Policy](https://about.gitlab.com/privacy/)[Support](https://gitlab.com/gitlab-org/gitlab/-/issues/561564)
    

The GitLab MCP server provides a secure integration between AI assistants and your GitLab instance using the Model Context Protocol standard. Connect to access projects, issues, merge requests, and code search.

You can use GitLab to:

**Ask a question:**  
"What can you help me do with GitLab?"

**Explore your data:**  
"Summarize the most recent activity in GitLab."
